mapper.sql: a.qna_id ,a.member_id ,a.creator_id ,a.created_dt ,(select login_id from cmmt_insider where member_id = a.member_id) as login_id ,(select member_nm from cmmt_insider where member_id = a.member_id) as member_nm ,(select fn_cmm_get_code_nm('DEPT_CD', dept_nm) as dept_nm from cmmt_insider where member_id = a.member_id) as dept_nm ,(select position_nm from cmmt_insider where member_id = a.member_id) as position_nm
